description: LTX-2.3 (distilled fp8) video-to-video occlusion / foreground removal using the Obscura Remova LoRA. Graph: axiomgraph/ComfyUIWorkflow 'LTX 2.3 Obscura_Remova'.
_HOWITRUNS: No-build path: a public ComfyUI base image (image) runs comfy_run.py, which on startup clones node_packs into custom_nodes and downloads models + the LoRA onto the Spark node, then converts cleanplate_ltx.workflow.json (UI graph) to API format via /object_info and renders. Nothing is built or pushed; nothing large touches your computer. Trade-off: ~30 GB is fetched on each COLD start (use --idle-hold to keep a warm node between iterations). --convert-only skips the model download (only node classes are needed for conversion), so it's quick.
_PARAMS: Node ids come from the UI graph and are preserved through conversion; patches apply post-conversion, so paths target API format. Primitive nodes (432/302) use input name 'value' by convention; if a patch warns 'not in graph' or inputs look wrong, pull the converted workflow_api.json (written to ShareSync) and check field names.
